_comment: Source of truth for the 13 items in the harness engineering adoption plan (8 original + 5 Phase 2 / Option C). Edit this file manually when an item ships (or a PR opens). The /test#dev/harness tab reads /dev-data/harness which is served from this file.

items.title: "Where to find things" map in CLAUDE.md
items.notes: Progressive-disclosure ToC + symbol map landed in CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md. Admin-merged after PR #302 (workflow regex) cleared the validate check.

items.title: Add `npm run typecheck` to pre-commit hook (warning-only)
items.notes: Warning-only mode so the ~185 existing errors do not break commits while the baseline is paid down. Promote to fatal once baseline reaches 0.

items.title: Per-session `.claude/local/state.md`
items.notes: Template + README at .claude/local-template/; gitignored .claude/local/. Cross-session same-agent continuity. Auto-inject hook is deferred to a future PR.

items.title: Post-merge smoke (curl + screenshot the 3 demo URLs) via GitHub Action
items.notes: Curls /test, /chatbot/, /dev-data/manifest after each push to main. Writes state/quality/e2e/<timestamp>.json, comments on the merge commit + opens a tracking issue on per-URL regression, tunnel-down heuristic suppresses noise when >=2 URLs unreachable. Paired Scripts/post-merge-smoke.ps1 for local runs.

items.title: `/grade-last-pr` skill: re-run octo:review against the merged diff
items.notes: Closes the intent-vs-delivery loop. Writes score to state/quality/pr-grades/<sha>.json. Skill at .claude/skills/grade-last-pr/SKILL.md.

items.title: Adopt `/council` from claude-codex-forge for one-way-door PRs
items.notes: Opt-in pre-merge gate. Detects one-way-door file paths (OPTIC-K dims, public APIs, contracts), spawns 5 specialist personas as advisors, backend-architect chairs synthesis. Output to state/quality/council/<sha>.json.

items.title: Playwright E2E job on demos dashboard + chatbot showcase
items.notes: 5 specs at ReactComponents/ga-react-components/tests/dashboard/. Asserts dashboard loads, heartbeat banner color, manifest schema_version, chatbot showcase response time < 5s, harness tab populates 8 items. First-run snapshot at state/quality/e2e/dashboard-playwright/<timestamp>.json. First run caught a real bug: stale local Vite serving SPA shell at /dev-data/harness — exact regression class the test is designed for.

items.title: Run Vite + GaApi as a non-admin Windows service
items.notes: Scaffold only. Three independent NSSM services (GA-Vite-5176, GA-Api-5232, GA-Chatbot-5252) under NetworkService. Runbook at docs/runbooks/non-admin-service-install.md. Status flips to 'shipped' only after user runs the install with admin. Existing install script was unfit for harness goal (wrapped Aspire AppHost); rewritten from ground up with -WhatIf support.

items.title: Semantic-regression chatbot suite (Phase 2 #1)
items.notes: Phase 2 #1. Adds semantic-equivalence regression tests on the chatbot golden traces so a model swap that changes wording but not meaning still passes, while a regression in correctness fails. Workflow auto-fires on chatbot-touching PRs.

items.title: Per-PR token spend annotation
items.notes: Phase 2 #2. Workflow walks the PR commit range, sums token usage across agent providers (Claude / Codex / Gemini), and annotates the PR description with the spend ledger. Surfaces runaway-cost regressions before merge.

items.title: /backlog-groom skill + weekly cron
items.notes: Phase 2 #3. Ranked top-3 work-item proposer over BACKLOG.md. Weekly cron runs the skill and posts the ranked proposal as a tracking issue. Closes the loop between strategic intent and what the next session picks up.

items.title: VSM cross-repo algedonic-channel layer (Option C)
items.notes: Option C — Beer/Stafford VSM alarm channel. Append-only state/algedonic/inbox.jsonl with severity-ranked signals (info/warn/fail/critical), ack-by-append semantics, supersedes chain. Contract at docs/contracts/2026-05-24-algedonic-channel.contract.md. Dashboard tile + /dev-data/algedonic endpoint. First live signal: sentrux not visible on GitHub Actions (PR #323 in flight).

items.title: /test-plan skill + auto-fire workflow
items.notes: Generates a structured test plan for any PR touching production code paths, writes to state/quality/test-plans/<sha>.json, auto-fires from a workflow on PR open. Pre-completion interceptor that turns 'I added a feature' into 'here are the explicit success criteria'.

related_prs.title: Harness engineering adoption plan
related_prs.note: Source document for this rollout — landed the plan itself.

related_prs.title: karpathy-rules workflow regex fix (split from #300)
related_prs.note: Workflow tweak split out of item #1 so the CLAUDE.md change could land via independent human review. Admin-merged after the split.

related_prs.title: Harness sub-tab on /test#dev/harness
related_prs.note: Visual dashboard that reads this items.json file. Built alongside the rollout to give live visibility into harness state.

related_prs.title: fix(algedonic): make sentrux visible on GitHub Actions
related_prs.note: First real algedonic signal — sentrux not visible on GitHub-side health checks. PR #323 acks the signal by fixing the workflow path.

principles.name: Context & memory management
techniques: Progressive disclosure navigation — small map + on-demand drill-down, not a 5000-line CLAUDE.md.
Disk-persistent state — decisions go to state/, docs/solutions/, docs/plans/ on the same beat as the conversation.
Cross-session memory compaction — auto-compact at 40%; durable knowledge off-loaded via the digest skill + precompact hook.

principles.name: Verification & feedback loops
techniques: Cybernetic governance loops — feed-forward skills + post-action evaluators against architecture boundaries.
Generator-evaluator separation — the agent that wrote the code is never the one to grade it.
Pre-completion interceptors — block 'done' until lint, type-check, build, and E2E suites are green.

principles.name: Workflow & environment security
techniques: User-experience E2E verification — outside-in browser checks so the agent sees what the user sees.
Mechanical invariant enforcement — encode rules into tooling (pre-commit, hooks, OS sandboxes), not prompts.

principles.name: Architecture-aligned techniques
techniques: claude-codex-forge 7-phase workflow — PRD → Research → Design → Review → Build → Verify → Ship.
`state.md` Workflow / Done / Now / Next — gitignored, read by hooks, kept out of auto-loaded context.
ADR / CHANGELOG / solutions/ as compounded knowledge — every session builds on the previous.
VSM algedonic channel — out-of-band alarm path bypassing normal hierarchy when something needs immediate attention.

frontend_typecheck_errors.source: cd ReactComponents/ga-react-components && npx tsc -b 2>&1 | grep -c 'error TS'
frontend_typecheck_errors.note: Treat as a debt ledger. algedonic-vsm-agent reduced 185 to 177 by fixing pre-existing errors. Number should never go up between PRs.

post_merge_smoke_urls.note: Item #4 shipped — these 3 are now automated post-merge curls via .github/workflows/post-merge-smoke.yml.

one_way_door_prs_gated_by_council.note: Item #6 shipped the `/council` skill. Counter increments once a real one-way-door PR opens and someone runs /council on it.

e2e_dashboard_coverage_tests.note: Item #7 shipped via PR #313 — 5 specs (dashboard-loads, heartbeat-banner, manifest-page, chatbot-showcase, harness-tab). 4/5 passing on first run; harness-tab caught a real local-Vite-stale bug (since fixed).

chatbot_semantic_regression_runs.note: Item #9 (PR #319) shipped the workflow. Counter increments once a chatbot-touching PR triggers it.

algedonic_signals_unacked.note: Item #12 (PR #322) shipped the channel. Currently 1 unacked: sentrux-not-on-github. PR #323 will ack.

auto_compact_threshold_pct.note: Set globally in ~/.claude/settings.json across all 6 repos. Status: have.
